title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Elon Musk's X Appears to Be Violating US Sanctions by Selling Premium Accounts to Iranian Leaders
items.description: While publicly supporting protesters in Iran, Elon Musk's X appears to have been selling premium accounts to regime officials. Checkmarks were removed...

items.title: How to Choose the Right TV in 2026 (and a Few We Like)
items.description: How many ports do you need? What does 4K UHD even mean? What's RGB LED? Here’s everything you need to know.

items.title: US FTC airs concerns over allegations that Apple News suppresses right-wing content
items.description: In a letter to Apple CEO Tim Cook, FTC chair Andrew Ferguson cited reports from Media Research Center, a right-leaning think tank, which accused Apple...

items.title: Hacker linked to Epstein removed from Black Hat cyber conference website
items.description: Emails published by the Justice Department revealed cybersecurity veteran Vincenzo Iozzo emailed, and arranged to meet, Jeffrey Epstein multiple times...

items.title: Didero lands $30M to put manufacturing procurement on ‘agentic’ autopilot
items.description: Didero functions as an agentic AI layer that sits on top of a company’s existing ERP, acting as a coordinator that reads incoming communications and a...

items.title: Eclipse backs all-EV marketplace Ever in $31M funding round
items.description: The San Francisco-based startup says its AI-first approach has allowed it to scale faster.

items.title: YouTube finally launches a dedicated app for Apple Vision Pro
items.description: When Apple Vision Pro first came out two years ago, YouTube hesitated to release a dedicated app. Today is the day they officially launch one.

items.title: Trump administration undermines EPA enforcement of Clean Air Act
items.description: The EPA's new rule seeks to undo a 2009 finding that allowed the federal government to regulate six greenhouse gases.

items.title: Anthropic raises another $30B in Series G, with a new value of $380B
items.description: The infusion of funding for the AI startup takes place as it is vying for customers and cultural attention with its competitor, OpenAI.

items.title: Apple acquires all rights to Severance, will produce future seasons in-house
items.description: The show is expected to run for four seasons, with the possibility of spin-offs, a prequel, and foreign versions.
